prompt: A clean modern microservices architecture diagram. Centered top: a rounded rectangle labeled "API Gateway" in deep blue. Three downward arrows fan out to three rounded rectangles labeled "Auth Service" "Order Service" "Payment Service" in teal. Each connects downward to its own database cylinder labeled "auth_db" "orders_db" "payments_db". Right side: a separate rounded rectangle "Message Queue (Kafka)" with dotted arrows from each service. Light gray background, clean SVG-style flat shapes, sharp typography, no shadows, generous spacing. Tech architecture documentation aesthetic.
